languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

languages.text: {n}Вернув самообладание, Эоганн вздевает палец:{/n} "Я чту Алое Соглашение Марса и клянусь перед лицом всезнающего и всевидящего Бога-Машины, что Нунциус не является порождением техноереси. Если я лгу, то пусть меня сразит электро-магнитный пульс Его гнева, а Движущая Сила покинет мои члены вовеки веков!"

{n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

Если я лгу, то пусть меня сразит электро-магнитный пульс Его гнева, а Движущая Сила покинет мои члены вовеки веков!"

If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

{n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

languages.text: {n}Nachdem Eogunn seine Fassung zurückerlangt hat, hebt er seinen Finger.{/n} "Ich ehre die Karmesinroten Verträge des Mars und schwöre vor dem allwissenden, allsehenden Maschinengott, dass Nuncius keiner Tech-Ketzerei entsprungen ist. Sollte ich lügen, will ich vom elektromagnetischen Impuls Seines Zorns niedergestreckt werden, auf dass die Antriebskraft meine Gliedmaßen für alle Zeit zerstören möge!"
languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem Eogunn seine Fassung zurückerlangt hat, hebt er seinen Finger.{/n} "Ich ehre die Karmesinroten Verträge des Mars und schwöre vor dem allwissenden, allsehenden Maschinengott, dass Nuncius keiner Tech-Ketzerei entsprungen ist. Sollte ich lügen, will ich vom elektromagnetischen Impuls Seines Zorns niedergestreckt werden, auf dass die Antriebskraft meine Gliedmaßen für alle Zeit zerstören möge!"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn tâche de reprendre contenance avant de dresser un doigt.{/n} « J'honore les Accords de Mars, et je jure devant le Dieu-Machine toutpuissant et omniscient que Nuncius n'est pas le produit d'une technohérésie. Si je mens, qu'Il me foudroie d'un éclair électromagnétique et que la Force Motrice déserte mes membres à jamais ! »
languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn tâche de reprendre contenance avant de dresser un doigt.{/n} « J'honore les Accords de Mars, et je jure devant le Dieu-Machine toutpuissant et omniscient que Nuncius n'est pas le produit d'une technohérésie. Si je mens, qu'Il me foudroie d'un éclair électromagnétique et que la Force Motrice déserte mes membres à jamais ! »

languages.text: {n}恢复镇定后，伊奥贡竖起一根手指。{/n}“我尊奉火星猩红协议，并在此向全知全视的万机之神起誓，努恩修斯绝非技术异端之产物。若我有半句虚言，便让祂的电磁脉冲之怒当场将我击倒，让源力永远不再流淌于我的肢体！”
languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

traits.locale_text: {n}恢复镇定后，伊奥贡竖起一根手指。{/n}“我尊奉火星猩红协议，并在此向全知全视的万机之神起誓，努恩修斯绝非技术异端之产物。若我有半句虚言，便让祂的电磁脉冲之怒当场将我击倒，让源力永远不再流淌于我的肢体！”

languages.text: {n}Cuando Eogunn recupera la compostura, levanta un dedo y proclama:{/n} «Honro el Acuerdo Carmesí de Marte y juro ante el Dios Máquina, que lo ve todo y lo sabe todo, que Nuncius no es fruto de ninguna tecnoherejía. Si miento, ¡que el pulso electromagnético de su cólera caiga sobre mí y que la Fuerza Motriz abandone mis extremidades por siempre!».
languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando Eogunn recupera la compostura, levanta un dedo y proclama:{/n} «Honro el Acuerdo Carmesí de Marte y juro ante el Dios Máquina, que lo ve todo y lo sabe todo, que Nuncius no es fruto de ninguna tecnoherejía. Si miento, ¡que el pulso electromagnético de su cólera caiga sobre mí y que la Fuerza Motriz abandone mis extremidades por siempre!».

languages.text: {n}エオガンは落ち着きを取り戻すと、指を立てた。{/n}「私は火星のクリムゾン協定に敬意を表し、全知全能の機械神の前で、ヌンキウスは技術異端の産物ではないと誓う。もし私が嘘をついたら、神の怒りの電磁パルスで私を打ちのめし、永遠に私の手足を動力から解放してください！」
languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは落ち着きを取り戻すと、指を立てた。{/n}「私は火星のクリムゾン協定に敬意を表し、全知全能の機械神の前で、ヌンキウスは技術異端の産物ではないと誓う。もし私が嘘をついたら、神の怒りの電磁パルスで私を打ちのめし、永遠に私の手足を動力から解放してください！」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, sakinliğini yeniden kazandıktan sonra parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Mars Kızıl Anlaşması'nı onurlandırıyor, her şeyi bilen ve her şeyi gören Makine Tanrı'nın huzurunda Nuncius'un tekno kâfirlik dölü olmadığına yemin ediyorum. Şayet yalan söylüyorsam O'nun gazabının elektromanyetik darbesiyle yere serileyim, Devinim Gücü de uzuvlarımı sonsuza dek terk etsin!"
languages.original_text: {n}After Eogunn regains his composure, he raises his finger.{/n} "I honour the Crimson Accord of Mars and swear before the all-knowing, all-seeing Machine God that Nuncius is no spawn of tech-heresy. If I lie, then let me be struck down by the electromagnetic pulse of His wrath, and let the Motive Force desert my limbs forever and ever!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, sakinliğini yeniden kazandıktan sonra parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Mars Kızıl Anlaşması'nı onurlandırıyor, her şeyi bilen ve her şeyi gören Makine Tanrı'nın huzurunda Nuncius'un tekno kâfirlik dölü olmadığına yemin ediyorum. Şayet yalan söylüyorsam O'nun gazabının elektromanyetik darbesiyle yere serileyim, Devinim Gücü de uzuvlarımı sonsuza dek terk etsin!"
